an8.31:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these eight gifts.
What eight? (1) Having insulted
, one gives a gift.
(2) One gives a gift from fear. (3) One gives a gift,
: ‘He gave to me.’ (4) One gives a gift,
: ‘He will give to me.’ (5) One gives a gift,
: ‘Giving is good.’ (6) One gives a gift,
: ‘I cook; these people do not cook. It isn’t right that I who cook should not give to those who do not cook.’ (7) One gives a gift,
: ‘Because I have given this gift, I will gain a good reputation.’ (8) One gives a gift for the purpose of ornamenting the mind, equipping the mind."
